sizing_rule.note: Allocate 100% only if all scenarios positive; otherwise use optimal f derived from scenario analysis with cumulative probabilities. Position sizing via HPRi formula weighted by outcome probability Pi and optimal f coefficient.

source_rule_text: Allocate 100% of resources only if all scenarios have positive outcomes; if at least one negative outcome scenario exists, use the optimal f formula to determine position sizing based on cumulative probability of outcomes.
